  ⏵⏵ auto mode on (shift+tab to cycle) · esc to interrupt
● Bash(grep -iE "hit your limit|limit reached|rate limited")
  contains phrases like "hit the same 2am reset" and "staggered resets"
  my own prose talking about the limit banner text:
  "you hit your limit" without the apostrophe — shouldn't match
● Some output about rate-limited tasks that isn't actually a banner

> waiting for input
